description_long: This is a thick, rectangular hardcover book with a muted blue-gray cover and black Gothic-style text on the front and spine. The book's cover is plain, lacking any visible illustration or artwork, and the edges of the pages are exposed, showing a natural, slightly yellowed paper texture. The title 'Exponentia Liber' is prominently displayed on the front cover and spine, while additional text appears along the top and bottom edges. The book appears sturdy and well-bound, with a solid, flat surface suitable for stacking or supporting small objects. The overall design is minimalistic and formal, suggesting a scholarly or historical theme. No publisher logo or decorative elements are visible on the cover or spine.
description: A thick, blue-gray hardcover book with black Gothic text and a plain, unadorned cover. The exposed page edges are slightly yellowed, and the book has a formal, scholarly appearance.
description_view_0: The front cover is visible, displaying the title and additional black text along the top and bottom edges, with the page edges exposed at the bottom.
description_view_1: The side view shows the book's thickness and the natural color of the page edges, with black text running along the spine and cover edges.
description_view_2: The back cover is visible, with no text or illustration, and the page edges are exposed at the bottom.
description_view_3: The spine is fully visible, featuring the title in large black Gothic text, and the blue-gray cover wraps around the book.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is blue-gray with large black Gothic-style text running horizontally, matching the front cover. No decorative elements or patterns are present.
